hero_subtitle: SFTY supports VASP compliance teams by consolidating sanctions screening alerts into auditable cases with preserved evidence and actionable workflow for reliable review and reporting.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Audit evidence gaps slow sanctions screening
problem_description: Sanctions screening decisions often depend on fragmented outputs that lack clear audit trails. This makes compliance teams’ efforts harder to defend during reviews and increases risk of incomplete evidence for regulatory audits.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY organizes fragmented sanctions screening data, provider results, reviewer actions and decision logs into a unified workflow that preserves audit evidence and supports defensible compliance reviews.
workflow_title: From sanctions alerts to case evidence
workflow_description: SFTY routes sanctions screening alerts through review, case creation, decision logging and evidence preservation to maintain a clear and auditable compliance trail.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_description: SFTY connects sanctions screening results into structured cases, decision logs and preserved evidence, giving compliance teams a clearer, provider-neutral audit trail for review and reporting.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASPs preserving defensible sanctions review evidence with provider integration, case governance and enterprise controls for reliable bank due diligence and operational audit trails.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for sanctions screening teams?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides a compliance control layer that connects sanctions screening outputs into structured reviews, alerts, cases, evidence and audit-ready reporting for VASPs and digital asset businesses.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY structure sanctions screening workflows?
faq_2_answer: SFTY centralizes sanctions alerts, applies internal risk rules, routes cases for review and escalation, and links decisions and evidence in a single operational workflow.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves decision logs, case history and supporting evidence to support audit readiness and traceability across sanctions screening reviews.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing compliance tools?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY can connect multiple sanctions screening providers and other compliance tools into one connected workflow without replacing existing systems.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace sanctions screening providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY sits above sanctions screening providers and turns their outputs into structured workflows, decisions and regulatory evidence without replacing the underlying tools.
final_title: Preserve audit-ready evidence for sanctions screening
final_description: Review how SFTY connects sanctions alerts into structured cases, decisions and evidence for reliable compliance workflows.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
